scripts.generate-data: echo 'Run from consuming project: lake exe atlas graph-data --output <path-to>/web/public/data/graph.json --pretty'
scripts.copy-lean-source: rm -rf public/lean-source && mkdir -p public/lean-source && if [ -n "$LEAN_ATLAS_SOURCE_DIR" ]; then cp -r "${LEAN_PROJECT_ROOT:-..}/$LEAN_ATLAS_SOURCE_DIR" public/lean-source/; else echo 'Set LEAN_ATLAS_SOURCE_DIR and optionally LEAN_PROJECT_ROOT to copy source files'; fi
scripts.build:full: pnpm run copy-lean-source && pnpm run build
